title: Lymecraft Cobblemon LITE
description: Lite version of the Lymecraft Cobblemon modpack. Higher performance but missing some features.
body:
Lymecraft's take on the Cobblemon experience, but more lightweight! Features most of the best addons from the community, ideal for survival or for our server!

Notable Features Include:

 - All 1025 Pokemon thanks to Complete Cobblemon Collection and Mega Showdown
 - Pokemon riding via the new 1.7 update!
 - Breeding via Cobbreeding
 - Pokemon fighting back via the new 1.7 update!
 - Size variations via CobblemonSizeVariation
 - Many performance optimisations via Sodium and various other mods
- Many features cut but significant performance boost compared to the primary pack, still capable of playing on the server
    

The pack is intended for the Lymecraft Cobblemon server, but is not required to play.
